center.name: 托斯卡纳大区
center.summary: 托斯卡纳大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白头鹀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is a rare vagrant to western Europe, but often winters in north-east Italy and Tuscany

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is a rare vagrant to western Europe, but often winters in north-east Italy and Tuscany
